description_long: This object is a finely detailed white statue depicting a serene, seated figure in a meditative pose, likely representing the bodhisattva Guanyin or a similar spiritual icon. The figure sits cross-legged atop a stylized lotus pedestal, with flowing robes cascading over the base and intricate folds sculpted into the garment. The hands are positioned in symbolic gestures, with one hand raised in a gesture of blessing and the other resting on the lap. The facial features are calm and gentle, with a high, ornate headdress crowning the head. The back of the statue is smooth, with draped fabric details, and the overall form is symmetrical and balanced. The surface appears to be made of a single, solid material with a matte, slightly smooth finish.
description: A white, intricately sculpted statue of a seated figure in meditation atop a lotus pedestal, featuring flowing robes and a serene expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full figure seated cross-legged, with detailed facial features, hand gestures, and ornate headdress clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the draping of the robes, and the depth of the lotus pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth back of the statue, with flowing robe details and the rounded form of the lotus base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hand positions, and the layered folds of the garment.
